capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an application management/production management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has an application or production workload management service.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise application or production workload management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the workload management service reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the workload management service is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent workload management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document all KPIs and KRIs for the Workload Management?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs for workload management are formalized and documented.
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for workload management

questions.prompt: Are the KPIs and KRIs for the Workload Management reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether workload management KPIs and KRIs are reviewed frequently.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented application management process that includes capacity planning, fault identification, segmentation and provisioning along with application security?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formalized documented application management process covers capacity planning, fault identification, segmentation, provisioning, and application security.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented application management process

questions.prompt: Is the application management process deployed enterprise wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the application management process is deployed enterprise-wide.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide application management process deployment

questions.prompt: Is the application management process reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the application management process is reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent application management process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have application classifications for all its applications, containers, systems, and VMs?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application classifications exist for applications, containers, systems, and VMs.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application classifications for applications, containers, systems, and VMs

questions.prompt: Are application classifications automated by the workload management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application classifications are automated by the workload management process.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated application classification in workload management

questions.prompt: Are the application classifications reviewed frequently to measure efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application classifications are reviewed frequently to measure efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent application classification review

questions.prompt: Are the application classifications integrated into other technology, for example when building object profiles?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application classifications integrate with other technology such as object profiles.
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration of classifications into other technology such as object profiles

questions.prompt: Do enterprise applications have capability to expand based on workload increase?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether enterprise applications can expand based on workload increase.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application capacity expansion based on workload increase

questions.prompt: Can all applications expand based on workload demand or is it restricted to critical apps only?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether scaling applies to all applications or is restricted to critical apps only.
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise-wide or critical-application scaling scope

questions.prompt: Can the applications expand capacity automatically or programmatically?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether applications can expand capacity automatically or programmatically.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic or programmatic capacity expansion

questions.prompt: Are the scaling configurations in the enterprise reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether scaling configurations are reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent scaling configuration review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented policy on local authentication and external authentication for applications, containers, etc.?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formalized documented policy governs local and external authentication for applications and containers.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized policy on local and external authentication

questions.prompt: Do all applications have external authentication enabled to an AD?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether all applications have external authentication enabled to AD.
questions.evaluation_focus: External authentication to AD for all applications

questions.prompt: Is external authentication part of the golden image and also part of provisioning templates if any?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether external authentication is part of golden images and provisioning templates.
questions.evaluation_focus: External authentication in golden images and provisioning templates

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise generate application baseline templates for all applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application baseline templates are generated for all applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application baseline templates for all applications

questions.prompt: Are the application baseline templates generated automatically based on flow discovery?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application baseline templates are generated automatically from flow discovery.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated baseline generation from flow discovery

questions.prompt: Are the baseline templates reviewed frequently for accuracy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether baseline templates are reviewed frequently for accuracy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent baseline template review for accuracy

capability_questions.capability_name: Application and Interface Security Policy or its equivalent

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise consider API security as an important aspect of application security?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise considers API security an important aspect of application security.
questions.evaluation_focus: API security as an important aspect of application security

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have formalized and documented application security policies for their applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise has formalized documented application security policies.
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented application security policies

questions.prompt: Are the application security policies reviewed frequently for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether application security policies are reviewed frequently for efficacy.
questions.evaluation_focus: Frequent application security policy review

capability_questions.capability_name: Secure information exchange and API security

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy secure API for all their applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise deploys secure APIs for all applications.
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure API deployment for all applications

questions.prompt: Are there API gateways protecting any workload that exposes an API?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether API gateways protect workloads that expose APIs.
questions.evaluation_focus: API gateways protecting workloads that expose APIs

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy application performance monitoring?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the enterprise deploys application performance monitoring.
questions.evaluation_focus: Application performance monitoring deployment

questions.prompt: Is APM deployed for all applications or only critical ones?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether APM is deployed for all applications or only critical ones.
questions.evaluation_focus: APM scope across all or critical applications

questions.prompt: Is APM for applications automated while provisioning or during development?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether APM is automated during provisioning or development.
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated APM during provisioning or development

questions.prompt: Does the APM integrate with the SOC to provide contextual information on availability?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether APM integrates with the SOC to provide availability context.
questions.evaluation_focus: APM integration with SOC for availability context
